data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 68,000 USDT with a 0.87% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2026, 01:05 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,723.710938 USDT, with a narrowed 0.87% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Oil prices rose as Trump delivered his speech.
data.description: According to Gate data, WTI crude oil broke through $100 per barrel, up 0.93% on the day. Brent crude oil broke through $99 per barrel, up 0.27% on the day.

data.title: Trump declared victory, stating that he did not need oil from the Middle East.
data.description: Trump declared victory, causing a brief plunge in gold prices. Trump: We don't need oil from the Middle East. (Golden Ten)

data.title: Iran Plans $1-per-Barrel Transit Toll for Oil Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Iran is reportedly planning to impose a $1-per-barrel transit toll on oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz, according to NS3.AI. The toll can be paid in Chinese yuan or stablecoins, and ship operators will be required to work through a brokerage firm associated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. They must also submit details regarding ownership, cargo, crew, and AIS for screening. Bloomberg highlighted that this toll would equate to approximately $2 million for a Very Large Crude Carrier transporting around 2 million barrels.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Deliver National Address on Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to deliver a national address at 9 a.m. According to Odaily, the speech will provide an important update on the situation with Iran.

data.title: Jupiter Lend Unaffected by Drift Incident, Expresses Support for Solana DeFi
data.description: Jupiter announced on the X platform that it remains unaffected by the Drift incident. According to Odaily, Jupiter Lend is not involved with the Drift market, and JLP is fully backed by underlying assets. Jupiter also acknowledged the challenging day for Solana DeFi, extending condolences to the Drift team and all those impacted.

data.title: DeFi Protocol Drift Experiences Significant Loss in Security Breach
data.description:
On April 2, DeFi protocol Drift suffered a security breach resulting in a loss of approximately $155.6 million from JLP positions. According to BlockBeats, Jupiter has clarified that its platform was not affected by this incident, as its lending product, Jupiter Lend, is not involved with the Drift market, and JLP assets are fully backed by underlying assets.

Jupiter also acknowledged the impact of this event on the Solana DeFi ecosystem, describing it as a "difficult day." The company expressed concern for the Drift team and the affected users.

data.title: Trust Wallet Discord shortened links have been hijacked and are now redirecting to phishing servers.
data.description: According to ZachXbt's monitoring, the short Discord link for Trust Wallet, discord[.]gg/trustwallet, has been hijacked and is currently redirecting to a phishing server. Users should avoid joining this Discord through links provided by official channels (including the official website, Telegram, blogs, etc.).

data.title: STOCKS | Nikkei Index Surpasses 54,000 Points for First Time in a Week
data.description: The Nikkei Index experienced a positive start, surpassing the 54,000-point level for the first time in a week. According to RTHK, the index was reported at 54,152 points earlier, marking an increase of 412 points or 0.77%. This rise indicates a favorable trend in the Japanese stock market.

data.title: Riot Platforms Sells Additional Bitcoin Amid Ongoing Sales
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms has sold another 500 BTC, according to Foresight News. This brings the company's total sales for the month to over 1,000 BTC.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Zhipu Unveils GLM-5V-Turbo for Multimodal Programming
data.description: Zhipu has introduced the GLM-5V-Turbo, a multimodal coding model designed for visual programming. According to Odaily, this model natively understands various multimodal inputs, including images, videos, design drafts, and document layouts. It also supports the use of multimodal tools such as framing, screenshotting, and web page reading, with an expanded context window of up to 200,000.

data.title: Australia's February Trade Surplus Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Australia's trade balance for goods and services in February reached AUD 5.686 billion, surpassing the anticipated AUD 2.85 billion and the previous value of AUD 2.631 billion. According to Jin10, this significant increase in the trade surplus reflects stronger-than-expected export performance and a robust economic outlook for the country.

data.title: Zhipu releases GLM-5V-Turbo, a multimodal coding foundation model.
data.description: Zhipu released GLM-5V-Turbo, a multimodal coding foundation model for visual programming. It natively understands multimodal inputs such as images, videos, design drafts, and document layouts, and supports multimodal tool calls such as drawing frames, taking screenshots, and reading web pages. The context window has been expanded to 200k. (Jinshi)

data.title: Elon Musk and SEC Headed for Trial Over Twitter Acquisition Dispute
data.description:
Elon Musk and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) have informed a judge that they are moving towards a trial to address allegations that Musk misled investors prior to his 2022 acquisition of Twitter. According to ChainCatcher, this development comes as a joint case progress report was submitted to a federal court in Washington on Wednesday, just two weeks after lawyers from both sides indicated they were negotiating a settlement.

The new document reveals that the legal teams and their clients have discussed alternative dispute resolution methods. However, it states, "Both parties believe that, under the current circumstances, the court's alternative dispute resolution procedures or any other form of alternative dispute resolution would not be beneficial for this case." Musk has recently faced setbacks in other legal matters related to his acquisition of Twitter four years ago.

data.title: Bank of Korea to Monitor Inflation Amid Middle East Tensions and Oil Price Uncertainty
data.description: The Bank of Korea has announced its intention to closely monitor the inflation situation due to increasing uncertainties in the Middle East and fluctuating oil prices. According to Jin10, the central bank emphasized the potential impact of geopolitical tensions and energy market volatility on the country's economic stability. The Bank of Korea's vigilance comes as global markets remain sensitive to developments in the region, which could influence inflationary pressures and economic forecasts. The central bank's statement highlights the importance of maintaining economic stability in the face of external challenges.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock markets opened higher.
data.description: South Korea's KOSPI index opened 85.25 points higher, or 1.56%, at 5563.95 on Thursday, April 2nd. Japan's Nikkei 225 index opened 270.43 points higher, or 0.50%, at 54010.11 on Thursday, April 2nd. (Jinshi)

data.title: Asian Markets Open Higher with Gains in South Korea and Japan
data.description: South Korea's KOSPI index opened on April 2, Thursday, with an increase of 85.25 points, marking a rise of 1.56%, reaching 5563.95 points. According to Odaily, Japan's Nikkei 225 index also saw gains, opening up by 270.43 points, a 0.50% increase, reporting at 54010.11 points.

data.title: South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb postpones its IPO until after 2028.
data.description: A Bithumb executive stated that the company will "focus on preparing for its IPO by 2027." CFO Jeong Sang-gyun said at the company's annual shareholders' meeting that Bithumb is "strengthening its accounting policies and internal controls" following its IPO advisory contract with Samjong KPMG. Bithumb had previously planned to go public in 2025. At the shareholders' meeting, CEO Lee Jae-won was re-elected for two years. During his tenure, Bithumb was suspended from operations for six months and fined $24 million by South Korean regulators for allegedly violating anti-money laundering regulations. Meanwhile, Dunamu, the operator of another major South Korean exchange, Upbit, also plans an IPO after completing a share swap with Naver Financial, expected in September.

data.title: Bank of Korea: Government Measures, Including Fuel Price Cap, Contain March Inflation
data.description: The Bank of Korea has reported that government interventions, such as the implementation of a fuel price cap, have successfully curbed inflation in March. According to Jin10, these measures have played a significant role in stabilizing consumer prices during this period. The central bank's analysis indicates that without these interventions, inflationary pressures could have been more pronounced. The report highlights the importance of such policies in managing economic stability and controlling price levels in the country.

data.title: Binance Offers Special USDT Flexible Products Promotion in Bahrain
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing a special opportunity for new users in Bahrain to grow their USDT holdings. This limited-time promotion allows eligible participants to subscribe to USDT Flexible Products and earn a 20% Bonus Tiered Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for a period of 10 days. The promotion runs from 2026-04-02 08:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-02 23:59 (UTC).

The offer is exclusively available to new users in Bahrain, and it may take up to 48 hours for newly registered users to access the special offer. The subscription format allows for a maximum of ten days, with rewards distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Bonus Tiered APR rewards are credited daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting two days after subscription. Additionally, Real-Time APR is accrued and accumulated in users' Earn Accounts every minute.

The promotion features a total prize pool of 3,000 USDT, which will be distributed until the pool is exhausted or the promotion period ends. Only users who complete identity verification during the promotion period are eligible for rewards, and only master accounts qualify for Bonus Tiered APR rewards. Sub-accounts are not eligible. Users must adhere to Binance's terms and conditions, including those specific to prize promotions and privacy notices.

Participants can redeem their Flexible Products at any time, but doing so will halt the accrual of Bonus Tiered APR rewards for that day. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who tamper with the program or act fraudulently. The platform also retains the discretion to cancel or amend the promotion as needed. Users are encouraged to review the Binance Simple Earn Terms & Conditions and Risk Warning for more information.
